originalTitle: Spencer Pratt concedes LA mayor race, but declares ‘war’ against advancing candidates
summary: In video, The Hills actor, who did not contest the outcome of the election, said his campaign to ‘save’ LA was just starting
content: Spencer Pratt appeared to concede the Los Angeles mayor’s race on Friday in a new video where he says “the campaign portion of my mission to save Los Angeles is coming to a close”, but declares “war” against the two candidates advancing to the city’s general election. In the video posted on social media, Pratt notably did not contest the results of the election, despite Donald Trump’s repeated, but unfounded claims the race was “rigged”. Trump, who endorsed Pratt, called California’s elections “crooked”. Although Pratt previously said he would leave LA if he did not win the election, the former reality TV star said in Friday’s video he is just starting his campaign to “save” LA. On Monday, Nithya Raman, the progressive city councilmember, edged out Pratt to advance in the mayoral race. Raman will face the incumbent Karen Bass in November’s general election. In his video, Pratt claimed to have information that could be damaging to either Raman’s or Bass’s campaign. “We have some recordings of one of your exalted candidates doing and saying something that would make her resign in shame. I was saving it for the general election,” Pratt said. In a May interview with Adam Carolla, a podcast host, Pratt said: “If Karen Bass gets re-elected or Nithya gets elected, I will be done with trying to live in LA.” But in Friday’s video, Pratt said: “I’m moving on to the next, more interesting phase,” adding: “I don’t have campaign laws hamstringing me now. It’s war.” “I didn’t get in this for political power, I got in this to expose this corrupt machine. Nothing’s changed. You enjoy your worthless meetings at city hall,” he said. “You think your election is going to stop me. If you want to stop me, you’re going to have to fucking kill me.” Pratt launched his campaign in January on the one-year anniversary of the Palisades fire, the largest wildfire in Los Angeles county history, which destroyed his Pacific Palisades home. He centered concerns about the wildfire and the future of Los Angeles in his campaign, framing the city as facing an apocalyptic moment. As a registered Republican running in largely Democratic Los Angeles, which has not elected a Republican mayor in more than 20 years, Pratt faced an uphill battle, even when he secured Trump’s endorsement in May. Pratt, best known for his villainous turn on MTV’s mid-80s reality series The Hills, frequently faced questions about his lack of political experience.
chineseTitle: 斯宾塞·普拉特承认洛杉矶市长竞选，但向晋级候选人宣战
chineseSummary: 在视频中，《山丘》演员没有对选举结果提出异议，他表示他“拯救”洛杉矶的运动才刚刚开始
chineseContent: 周五，斯宾塞·普拉特在一段新视频中似乎承认了洛杉矶市长的竞选，他在视频中表示“我拯救洛杉矶的竞选任务即将结束”，但他向两位进入该市大选的候选人宣战。在社交媒体上发布的视频中，普拉特显然没有对选举结果提出异议，尽管唐纳德·特朗普一再但毫无根据地声称选举被“操纵”。支持普拉特的特朗普称加州的选举“不诚实”。尽管普拉特此前表示，如果他没有赢得选举，他将离开洛杉矶，但这位前真人秀明星在周五的视频中表示，他刚刚开始“拯救”洛杉矶的竞选活动。周一，进步派市议员 Nithya Raman 击败普拉特，在市长竞选中晋级。拉曼将在 11 月的大选中面对现任总统凯伦·巴斯 (Karen Bass)。普拉特在视频中声称掌握的信息可能会损害拉曼或巴斯的竞选活动。 “我们有一些录音，记录了一位受人尊敬的候选人的所作所为和所说的话，这些话会让她羞愧地辞职。我把它留到大选时用，”普拉特说。普拉特在五月接受播客主持人亚当·卡罗拉 (Adam Carolla) 采访时表示：“如果凯伦·巴斯 (Karen Bass) 再次当选或尼西亚 (Nithya) 当选，我将不再尝试在洛杉矶生活。”但在周五的视频中，普拉特说：“我正在进入下一个更有趣的阶段，”并补充道：“现在没有竞选法限制我。这是战争。” “我参与这件事不是为了政治权力，我参与这件事是为了揭露这个腐败机器。什么都没有改变。你喜欢​​在市政厅举行毫无价值的会议，”他说。 “你认为你的选举会阻止我。如果你想阻止我，你就必须他妈的杀了我。”普拉特在一月份发起了他的竞选活动
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
